task: Plug in the power cord to the socket
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white power cord lies on a green and white gradient surface. A white power strip is mounted on the wall. The power cord has two ends with plugs. The power strip has multiple sockets. STRATEGY - First, grasp the power cord to pick it up. Then, transport it to the power strip. Next, align the plug with a socket and insert it. Finally, release the power cord to complete the connection. Failure modes include misaligning the plug, dropping the cord, or choosing the wrong socket. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: reach the power cord body to grasp it. Step 2: grasp the power cord body to lift it. Step 3: transport the power cord to the power strip. Step 4: align the plug with a socket and insert it. Step 5: release the power cord to ensure it stays in place.

**Goal:** plugged(power_cord, power_strip); stable(power_cord)
**Scene:** power_cord, power_strip, surface
**Step 1:** reach(power_cord)
  affordance_region: the body of the white power cord
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, power_cord, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, power_cord) < 0.03
**Step 2:** grasp(power_cord)
  affordance_region: the body of the white power cord
  contact: holding(power_cord) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(power_cord)
**Step 3:** transport(power_cord -> power_strip)
  affordance_region: an empty socket on the power strip
  spatial: above(power_cord, power_strip, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(power_cord)
  done_when: above(power_cord, power_strip, 0.05)
**Step 4:** insert(power_cord)
  affordance_region: the top opening of a socket on the power strip
  contact: plugged(power_cord, power_strip) [completion]; released(power_cord) [completion]
  pose: stable(power_cord) [completion]
  done_when: plugged(power_cord, power_strip) AND released(power_cord)
**Step 5:** release(power_cord)
  affordance_region: the body of the white power cord
  contact: released(power_cord) [completion]
  done_when: released(power_cord)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white power cord
the body of the white power cord
an empty socket on the power strip
the top opening of a socket on the power strip
the body of the white power cord
